articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better - TechCrunch
articles.description: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.
articles.content:
When I opened the box the Oura Ring 5 comes in, my first thought was, Wow, thats tiny. My second thought was that this is a smart ring a lot of people have been waiting for. 
As someone who got quit… [+4915 chars]
